description: Ginger Cat, a lovable member of the Mini Flopsie collection by Aurora, captures hearts with its vibrant orange stripes and big, green eyes. This plush kitty is exquisitely crafted to reflect the playful and curious nature of real cats, making it an endearing addition to any plush collection. Aurora's commitment to detail and quality shines through, making Ginger Cat a perfect companion for both cuddles and imaginative play.Established in 1981, Aurora World is a renowned global leader in plush toys and high-quality gift products.
